Background History
memoryArtifacts.description:
Henry Grey, 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys was an English peer. He was the son of John Grey, 1st Earl of Tankerville and his wife Joan Charleton, co-heiress and 6th Lady of Powys.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys於1418年出生在英國諾圖波藍德希頓時，他的父親Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys33歲，母親Joan Cherleton18歲。他於大約1436年與Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年1月13日在法國帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys于1418年出生在英国諾圖波藍德希頓时，他的父亲Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys33岁，母亲Joan Cherleton18岁。他于大约1436年与Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年1月13日在法国帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys was born in 1418, in Heaton, Northumberland, England, his father, Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys, was 33 and his mother, Joan Cherleton, was 18. He married Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville about 1436. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 January 1450, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 32, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys est né en 1418, à Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Cherleton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville environ 1436. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1450, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys 1418 in Heaton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys 33 und seine Mutter Joan Cherleton 18. Er hat um 1436 Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Januar 1450 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville circa 1436. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powysが1418年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヒートンで生まれた時，父Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powysは33歳，母Joan Cherletonは18歳であった。約1436年にAntigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年1月13日にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys(이)가 1418년 영국 노르스벌랜드 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Cherleton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1436년 Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 1월 13일 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys nasceu em 1418, em Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cherleton, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville aproximadamente 1436. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1450, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, França, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bauge, Maine-et-Loire, Pays De La Loire,: баугe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Grey 2nd Earl of Tankerville, 7th Lord of Powys родился в 1418 г. в местности хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Cherleton, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville около 1436 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 января 1450 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Antigone of Gloucester Countess of Tankerville aproximadamente 1436. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de enero de 1450, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
